lockingPolicy.lockReason: Bugfix-fastlane planning-artifact reconcile; scenarios drive guard-verification + evidence-fidelity proof.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: traceability-guard.sh re-runs captured in report.md: red at exit 1 (scenario manifest cross-check skipped — 0 scenarios found) pre-fix, green at PASSED (cross-check ACTIVE, 6 contracts) post-fix.
